title: How Do You Sleep?
why_this_song: How Do You Sleep? by Sam Smith (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I'm hoping that my love will keep you up tonight"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I'm hoping that my love will keep you up tonight"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Baby, How Do You Sleep when you lie to me?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Baby, How Do You Sleep when you lie to me?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm hoping that my love will keep you up tonight"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Love will keep you up tonight
Oh no, how did I manage to lose me?
Look what I have done now
Dialling up the numbers on you
I don't want my heart to break
Baby, How Do You Sleep when you lie to me?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "keep" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "keep" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tonight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tonight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I am not this desperate, not this crazy

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "How Do You Sleep?" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "How Do You Sleep?" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "How Do You Sleep?", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "How Do You Sleep?", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "How Do You Sleep?" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "How Do You Sleep?" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
